calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2019 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2018 Set For Trial On May-06-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Continued To Sep-26-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-08-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY, PG&E CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT - Defendants PG&E Corporation and Pacific Gas & Electric Company, Inc.'s demurrer to all eight causes of action in the second amended complaint filed by plaintiff Mark Makowiecki is: sustained without leave to amend as to the first cause of action for breach of the implied contract of continued employment and is overruled as to the remaining causes of action. Mr. Makowiecki has not opposed PG&E's demurrer to the first cause of action. As to the second cause of action for slander per se, Mr. Makowiecki has sufficiently alleged the substance of the slanderous statements and has alleged that they are false. Mr. Makowiecki has also alleged at least one slanderous statement that is not time-barred by the slander limitations period. As to the third and fourth causes of action for intentional and negligent interference with contract and /or prospective economic relationships, Mr. Makowiecki has sufficiently alleged the slanderous statements as independently wrongful conduct, although no independently wrongful conduct needs to be alleged for the interference with contract claims. As to the fifth and eighth causes of action for violation of the Unfair Competition Law and injunctive relief, the facts alleged to support the slander and interference claims also support the UCL claim and serve as a basis for injunctive relief. As to the sixth and seventh causes of action for intentional and negligent infliction of emotional distress, Mr. Makowiecki has alleged extreme and outrageous conduct by PG&E by attempting to prevent Mr. Makowiecki from being employable in his chosen field. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-24-2018 Continued To Aug-15-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Pg&E Corporation, Pacific Gas & Electric Company Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint (For Tentative Ruling Purposes Only Part 2 Of 2)
Off Calendar May-17-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Defendants Pg&E Corporation and Pacific Gas & Electric Company's Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint is a duplicate entry.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Donald Ulrich of the Ulrich Law Firm, Tel. No. 1-916-441-4554
appearing for the plaintiff;
Atty. Joshua D. Kienitz of the Littler Law Firm, Tel. No. 1-415-399-8451 appearing
for the Defendants.
